projects.title: Maison Laurent
projects.description: French-inspired bistro in Bangkok. Full website with online reservations, digital menus, and private dining enquiry. Launched in 9 days.

projects.title: Villa Samara
projects.description: 6-bedroom luxury villa in Koh Samui. Premium showcase site with booking enquiry, staff profiles, and concierge services. Doubled direct enquiries within 6 weeks.

projects.title: Chef Aria — Private Dining
projects.description: Personal brand site for a private chef offering villa experiences and events across Southeast Asia. Portfolio, menus, and enquiry system.

projects.title: Grove Coffee Co.
projects.description: Specialty coffee brand launching in Chiang Mai. Full brand identity plus e-commerce website for online bean sales and subscription offering.

projects.title: The Shore House
projects.description: 12-room boutique hotel in Krabi. Complete redesign from a dated WordPress site — new identity, rooms showcase, integrated with Cloudbeds.

projects.title: SY Meridian
projects.description: Luxury sailing yacht offering charter experiences across the Mediterranean and Southeast Asia. Spec pages, crew profiles, routes, and enquiry system.
